message:
test(mux-pool): Add property-based test suite for MuxPoolStats invariants

Introduces comprehensive proptest-driven tests for the vendored mux_pool
module validating both serialization correctness and behavioral invariants:

- Serde JSON roundtrip tests for MuxPoolStats and embedded PoolStats with
  both standard and pretty-printed JSON formats
- Behavioral invariant tests ensuring:
  - recovery_successes <= recovery_attempts
  - health_check_failures <= health_checks
  - idle_count + active_count <= max_size (pool capacity bounds)
  - total_returned <= total_acquired (leak detection)
- Edge case coverage for zero counters and max u64 values
- JSON structure completeness validation ensuring all expected fields present
- 200 test cases per property across 8 total property tests

Also updates beads issue tracker metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
